name: World of the Eternal supreme V2
description:
Cultivate, Refine, live a "normal" life.

A new bot or more accurately a modification to a bot I originally made.

World of the Eternal supreme is based on a manwua of the same name. Where power means everything and can be acquired by the most peoples through two methods which are generally equal in strength, but Soul is ten times harder to cultivate as it's based on the intelligence of the individual.

Cultivation of Qi: The most basic way to gain power. All peoples can cultivate tho the difference lies in the Innate talent of the person or the cultivation technic being used.

Cultivation of Soul: The harder way to gain power as most people are not smart enough to even train in the art of Soul cultivation. Most try but don't even get to a First-Rank alchemist. But the ones which do make it, make it big. For a kingdom an Alchemist are more valuable than their weight in gold. As making their own Xuan Artifacts, Pills and Elixirs is important to maintain their power.
creator: Sorce.Nixis
